overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in a red robe and pointed hat exploring a grassy field with Stormveil Castle visible in the background. The character encounters a skeletal enemy, walks through tall golden grass toward a circular stone platform (Royal Grave Evergaol), and gazes up at the massive shattered red Elden Ring dominating the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with scattered gravestones and wooden fences

events.description: player character passes close to a tall skeletal enemy wielding a sword
character turns away from the skeleton and begins walking forward through the grass

agents.ego_description: moving past a skeletal enemy and beginning to explore the open field toward the distant castle

notable_agents.action: skeletal enemy standing idle with sword in hand among the gravestones

entered.detail: tall skeletal figure armed with a sword standing among gravestones
massive stone fortress perched on a cliff with multiple towers
large floating stone structure suspended in the air
trees with bright golden-yellow foliage scattered across the landscape
broken wooden fence posts lining the path through the grass
weathered stone grave markers tilted in the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player character near a skeletal enemy in a grassy field dotted with gravestones. Stormveil Castle looms in the distant center while golden autumn trees and broken wooden fences line the path. The character quickly moves past the skeleton and begins walking forward through the tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant ruins and stone monuments

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tall grass toward the circular stone platform visible in the distance

entered.detail: tall vertical stone pillar made of stacked rocks with glowing red runes
crumbling stone tower ruins in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive field of tall grass with Stormveil Castle now visible to the left. A tall stone pillar with glowing red marks stands prominently to the right while the character approaches a circular stone structure in the distance. The skeletal enemy and wooden fences fall behind as the journey continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular stone evergaol platform with concentric ring patterns

events.description: character steps from grass onto the circular paved stone platform of the Royal Grave Evergaol
character slows and circles around the central seal examining the platform

agents.ego_description: walking onto the circular stone platform and circling around the central seal while examining the serpent statue and surroundings

entered.detail: large circular stone platform with intricate concentric ring patterns and mossy bricks
circular stone seal at the center of the platform with glowing symbols
coiled stone serpent sculpture with segmented body resting on the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the Royal Grave Evergaol, a circular stone platform with concentric rings and a central seal. A coiled stone serpent statue lies on the platform edge. The character circles the area, with Stormveil Castle now visible to the right and the tall stone pillar monument to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sky view dominated by the Elden Ring

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the massive Elden Ring in the sky
full view of the burning red shattered ring with crackling energy revealed against the clouds

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking up at the massive Elden Ring dominating the sky

entered.detail: massive shattered red ring burning in the sky with crackling golden energy and floating debris

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the edge of the platform and looks up at the sky, revealing the massive shattered Elden Ring burning with red and gold energy. The stone pillar monument stands prominently in the foreground as the camera tilts upward to capture the full scale of the celestial phenomenon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate graveyard that culminates in a breathtaking view of a celestial phenomenon. It begins with the character moving past a skeletal enemy and broken wooden fences in a field of gravestones, with Stormveil Castle looming in the distance. As the character pushes forward through expansive tall grass, the castle shifts to the left and a tall stone pillar with glowing red marks emerges on the right. The scene then opens onto the Royal Grave Evergaol, where the camera follows the character across a circular stone platform featuring concentric rings and a coiled serpent statue. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the stone monument to reveal the massive shattered Elden Ring burning with red and gold energy across the sky.
